html:
Exclusive to:

Ghostly Elixirs are 9 character-exclusive Items craftable by Wendy in the Survivor Items Filter, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. Each of them can be used to temporarily improve Abigail's abilities. The effects stop when Abigail is destroyed. Ghostly Elixirs can be applied via an Abigail's Flower when Abigail is unsummoned. An icon on the border of Abigail's health badge indicates when the buff is active. Abigail can only have one effect active at a time. Each subsequent Ghostly Elixir erases the effect of the previous one.

If an elixir is used by Wendy with the "Strong Brew" skill, it will have doubled effect duration (does not work with Spectral Cure-All).

Wendy with the "Extra Yield" skill has a 40% chance to craft double and 10% chance to craft triple of the same Elixirs from the same ingredients for free.

Contents

  • 1 Overview
  • 2 Elixir
    • 2.1 Revenant Restorative
    • 2.2 Spectral Cure-All
    • 2.3 Unyielding Draught
    • 2.4 Distilled Vengeance
    • 2.5 Nightshade Nostrum
    • 2.6 Vigor Mortis
    • 2.7 Ghastly Experience
  • 3 Super Elixir
    • 3.1 Luminous Wrath
    • 3.2 Cursed Vexation
  • 4 Trivia

Overview

Icon Name Recipe To Abigail To Player Character
Effect Duration Effect Duration
Revenant Restorative x1 x1 +2/s 1 day/8 minutes +1/s 20 seconds
Spectral Cure-All x3 x1 +20/s 30 seconds +5/s 20 seconds
Unyielding Draught x1 x1 Doubles the duration of Abigail's protective shield from 0.5 to 1 second
(the shield absorbs all damage after the initial attack) 		1 day/8 minutes Gain a 50 shield that absorbs incoming damage.
After being hit, it applies a 10-second cooldown. This effect stacks with armor protection. 		2 minutes
Distilled Vengeance x3 x1 Doubles the duration of Abigail's protective shield from 0.5 to 1 seconds
In addition to absorbing damage, all Mobs attacking a shield take 20 damage. 		1 day/8 minutes Gain a 50 shield that absorbs incoming damage.
After being hit, it applies a 10-second cooldown. This effect stacks with armor protection and deals 20 damage to surrounding mobs when hit. 		2 minutes
Nightshade Nostrum x3 x1 Makes Abigail's attacks deal nighttime damage (40) regardless of the time of the day 1 day/8 minutes Night vision. 6 minutes
Vigor Mortis x1 x1 Increases Abigail's movement speed by 75% 1 day/8 minutes Offset up to 25% of slowdown from carrying heavy objects.
Won't get slowed down by Sticky Webbing and Honey Trail. 		1 day/8 minutes
Ghastly Experience x1 x3
(need ) 		Upgrade Abigail to Level 3 immediately. 2 minutes +5 and +12.5 immediately.
Remove 25% of Max Health Penalty immediately. 		0.3 seconds
Cursed Vexation x1 x3
(need ) 		Super Elixir, can be used with regular Elixir at the same time.
When Abigail inflicted the vex, Wendy's attacks deal +10 Planar Damage to foes. 		1 day/8 minutes Can't Drink
Luminous Wrath x1 x3
(need ) 		Super Elixir, can be used with regular Elixir at the same time.
Abigail's attack deal extra 10 Planar Damage.
100 Planar Damage when she is Gestalt 		2 minutes

Elixir

Revenant Restorative

“It's all I can do to help...”

–Wendy

“Raises Abigail's health regeneration from 1 to 3 health per second. Lasts 1 day.”

-

The Revenant Restorative triples Abigail's health regeneration rate (from 1 to 3 per second) for 1 day, for a total of 960 health. It requires 1 Spider Gland and 1 Mourning Glory to craft.

Buff Badge

Spectral Cure-All

“You have to take your medicine, Abigail.”

–Wendy

“Raises Abigail's health regeneration from 1 to 20 health per second. Lasts 30 seconds.”

-

The Spectral Cure-All regenerates Abigail's health at a rate of 20 per second over 30 seconds, for a total of 600 health. It requires 1 Telltale Heart and 3 Mourning Glory to craft.

Buff Badge

Unyielding Draught

“This time... I can protect you.”

–Wendy

“Doubles Abigail's shield duration from 0.5 seconds to 1 second. Lasts 1 day.”

-

The Unyielding Draught doubles the duration of Abigail's protective shield from 0.5 to 1 second for 1 day. (The shield absorbs all damage after the initial attack). It requires 1 Log and 1 Mourning Glory to craft.

Buff Badge

Distilled Vengeance

“It has a bitter aftertaste.”

–Wendy

“Doubles Abigail's shield duration from 0.5 seconds to 1 second.

Attacking creatures also take 20 damage.

Lasts 1 day.”

-

The Distilled Vengeance doubles the duration of Abigail's protective shield from 0.5 to 1 second for 1 day. (The shield absorbs all damage after the initial attack). In addition to absorbing damage, all Mobs attacking a shield take 20 damage. It requires 1 Living Log and 3 Mourning Glory to craft.

Buff Badge

Nightshade Nostrum

“Abigail was always the strong one.”

–Wendy

“Abigail will deal her nighttime damage during the day and dusk. Lasts 1 day.”

-

The Nightshade Nostrum makes Abigail deal nighttime damage during the daytime and dusk for 1 day. It requires 1 Stinger and 3 Mourning Glory to craft.

Buff Badge

Vigor Mortis

“It's quite sugary.”

–Wendy

“Abigail has a 75% speed boost for 1 day.”

-

The Vigor Mortis increases Abigail's movement speed by 75% (8.75 in Player Speed) for 1 day. It requires 1 Honey and 1 Mourning Glory to craft. Ghost players can haunt this to receive the same buff for 3 seconds.

Buff Badge

Ghastly Experience

“You'll feel like yourself again soon, Abby.”

–Wendy

The Ghastly Experience Elixir immediately upgrades Abigail to her third level, setting her maximum to 600. If you used Ghastly Experience when Abigail has 100% of her max HP (150 for 1st level or 300 for 2nd level), she will get third level with all 600 hp.

Super Elixir

Super Elixirs can work in parallel with a regular elixir. However, they cannot be drunk by a player with Wraith's Wreath. The "Strong Brew" skill also increases their duration.

Luminous Wrath

“You'll leave them reeling, Abby.”

–Wendy

Luminous Wrath is a Super Elixir that works for 2 minutes and gives Abigail +10 Planar Damage. For Gestalt Abigail, it will give +100 Planar Damage. It can be crafted only by Wendy with the "Lunar Sisterhood II" skill.

Cursed Vexation

“Abby will make a big impression.”

–Wendy

Cursed Vexation is a Super Elixir that works for 2 mins and makes every attack on an enemy affected by vex deal +10 Planar Damage. It can be crafted only by Wendy with the "Shadow Sisterhood II" skill.

Trivia

  • Ghostly Elixirs were introduced in the Wendy Character Update as part of the character overhaul for Don't Starve Together.
  • Vigor Mortis is a word play on the phenomenon known as Rigor Mortis, which causes the body to stiffen up once something dies.
plainText:
Exclusive to:
“Ah yes. Very science-y.”
–Wilson, when examining any Elixir
“Someone should probably check if it's flammable. I volunteer!”
–Willow, when examining any Elixir
“Wolfgang not trust tiny bottles made by creepy girl.”
–Wolfgang, when examining any Elixir
“INFERIOR CRAFTSMANSHIP. A CHILD COULD HAVE MADE THIS”
–WX-78, when examining any Elixir
“Color-coded and clearly labeled. Well done!”
–Wickerbottom, when examining any Elixir
“Whoof, smells like week-old sockeye!”
–Woodie, when examining any Elixir
“It appears someone has been toying with the dark arts and crafts.”
–Maxwell, when examining any Elixir
“Tis a pöwerful elixir!”
–Wigfrid, when examining any Elixir
“Hey, you didn't tell me you were making crafts!”
–Webber, when examining any Elixir
“I'm not sure about some of those ingredients, mademoiselle.”
–Warly, when examining any Elixir
“For ghost friend”
–Wormwood, when examining any Elixir
“I don't think that's safe to drink...”
–Winona, when examining any Elixir
“Hyuyu! Someone's getting crafty!”
–Wortox, when examining any Elixir
“Ooooh! Me wanna make some too, florp!”
–Wurt, when examining any Elixir
“Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!”
–Walter, when examining any Elixir
“A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.”
–Wanda, when examining any Elixir
Ghostly Elixirs are 9 character-exclusive Items craftable by Wendy in the Survivor Items Filter, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. Each of them can be used to temporarily improve Abigail's abilities. The effects stop when Abigail is destroyed. Ghostly Elixirs can be applied via an Abigail's Flower when Abigail is unsummoned. An icon on the border of Abigail's health badge indicates when the buff is active. Abigail can only have one effect active at a time. Each subsequent Ghostly Elixir erases the effect of the previous one.
If an elixir is used by Wendy with the "Strong Brew" skill, it will have doubled effect duration (does not work with Spectral Cure-All).
Wendy with the "Extra Yield" skill has a 40% chance to craft double and 10% chance to craft triple of the same Elixirs from the same ingredients for free.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thuốc tiên ma quái là 9 Vật phẩm dành riêng cho nhân vật được Wendy chế tạo trong Bộ lọc vật phẩm sống sót, độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together. Mỗi người trong số họ có thể được sử dụng để tạm thời cải thiện khả năng của Abigail. Hiệu ứng dừng lại khi Abigail bị tiêu diệt. Thuốc tiên ma quái có thể được sử dụng thông qua Hoa của Abigail khi Abigail không được triệu hồi. Một biểu tượng ở viền huy hiệu sức khỏe của Abigail cho biết khi nào bùa lợi được kích hoạt. Abigail chỉ có thể kích hoạt một hiệu ứng tại một thời điểm. Mỗi Thuốc tiên ma quái tiếp theo sẽ xóa bỏ hiệu ứng của thuốc trước đó.
title: Ghostly Elixir

Lasts 1 day.}} The '''Nightshade Nostrum''' makes Abigail deal nighttime damage during the daytime and dusk for 1 day. It requires 1 [[Stinger]] and 3 [[Mourning Glory]] to craft. [[File:Nightshade Nostrum Buff Badge.png|thumb|left|Buff Badge]] {{Clear}} ===Vigor Mortis=== {{Object Infobox |burnTime = {{Pic32|Light_Sources_Filter|Fire}} 15 sec |name = Vigor Mortis |image = Vigor Mortis Dropped.png |icon = Vigor Mortis.png |description = Give your soul a little boo-st. |ingredient1 = Honey |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Mourning Glory |multiplier2 = 1 ({{pic24|Wendy Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic32|Wendy Filter}} |tier = 0 |perk = Greatly increases Abigail's speed. |stack = 20 |spawnCode = "ghostlyelixir_speed"}} {{Quote|It's quite sugary.|Wendy}} {{Scrapbook Info|Abigail has a 75% speed boost for 1 day.}} The '''Vigor Mortis''' increases Abigail's movement speed by 75% (8.75 in [[Player Speed]]) for 1 day. It requires 1 [[Honey]] and 1 [[Mourning Glory]] to craft. Ghost players can haunt this to receive the same buff for 3 seconds. [[File:Vigor Mortis Buff Badge.png|thumb|left|Buff Badge]] {{clear}} ===Ghastly Experience=== {{Object Infobox |burnTime = {{Pic32|Light_Sources_Filter|Fire}} 15 sec |name = Ghastly Experience |image = Ghastly Experience Dropped.png |icon = Ghastly Experience.png |description = Reminds Abigail of all she can be. |ingredient1 = Forget-Me-Lots |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Mourning Glory |multiplier2 = 3 ({{pic24|Wendy Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic32|Wendy Filter}} |stack = 20 |skill = Ghastly Experience (Skill) |skillOwner = Wendy |spawnCode = "ghostlyelixir_revive"}} {{Quote|You'll feel like yourself again soon, Abby.|Wendy}} The '''Ghastly Experience''' Elixir immediately upgrades Abigail to her third level, setting her maximum {{hp}} to 600. If you used '''Ghastly Experience''' when Abigail has 100% of her max HP (150 for 1st level or 300 for 2nd level), she will get third level with all 600 hp. {{Clear}} ==Super Elixir== Super Elixirs can work in parallel with a regular elixir. However, they cannot be drunk by a player with [[Wraith's Wreath]]. The "Strong Brew" skill also increases their duration. {{Clear}} ===Luminous Wrath=== {{Object Infobox |burnTime = {{Pic32|Light_Sources_Filter|Fire}} 15 sec |name = Luminous Wrath |image = Luminous Wrath Dropped.png |icon = Luminous Wrath.png |description = Abigail will pack an outerplanar punch. |ingredient1 = Pure Brilliance |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Mourning Glory |multiplier2 = 3 ({{pic24|Wendy Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic32|Wendy Filter}} |skill = Lunar Sisterhood II |skillOwner = Wendy |stack = 20 |spawnCode = "ghostlyelixir_lunar"}} {{Quote|You'll leave them reeling, Abby.|Wendy}} '''Luminous Wrath''' is a Super Elixir that works for 2 minutes and gives [[Abigail]] +10 [[Planar Damage]]. For Gestalt Abigail, it will give +100 Planar Damage. It can be crafted only by Wendy with the "Lunar Sisterhood II" skill. {{Clear}} ===Cursed Vexation=== {{Object Infobox |burnTime = {{Pic32|Light_Sources_Filter|Fire}} 15 sec |name = Cursed Vexation |image = Cursed Vexation Dropped.png |icon = Cursed Vexation.png |description = As if a ghost attack wasn't vexing enough. |ingredient1 = Pure Horror |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Mourning Glory |multiplier2 = 3 ({{pic24|Wendy Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic32|Wendy Filter}} |stack = 20 |skill = Shadow Sisterhood II |skillOwner = Wendy |spawnCode = "ghostlyelixir_shadow"}} {{Quote|Abby will make a big impression.|Wendy}} '''Cursed Vexation''' is a Super Elixir that works for 2 mins and makes every attack on an enemy affected by vex deal +10 [[Planar Damage]]. It can be crafted only by Wendy with the "Shadow Sisterhood II" skill. {{Clear}} == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * Ghostly Elixirs were introduced in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 19, 2020 - Wendy Character Update|Wendy Character Update]] as part of the character overhaul for ''Don't Starve Together''. * Vigor Mortis is a word play on the phenomenon known as [[wikipedia:Rigor_mortis|Rigor Mortis]], which causes the body to stiffen up once something dies. {{Craftable Items and Structures on DST}} [[vi:Ghostly Elixir]] [[zh:灵体草药]] [[Category:Survivor Items Filter]] [[Category:Always Available]] [[Category:Non-Flammable]] [[Category:Healing]]
